title: coffea canephora var. stuhlmannii
intro: Coffea canephora var. stuhlmannii, also known as robusta coffee, is a variety of the Coffea canephora plant, native to tropical Africa. It is a shrub or small tree that is primarily used for its coffee beans, which have been found to possess medicinal properties due to their high antioxidant and polyphenol content. The medicinal properties of robusta coffee have been linked to various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and anti-cancer properties, which may help to protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, robusta coffee is often used as a tincture, tea, or powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties and provide a potential boost to overall health and well-being.
